title: PC Health Check Report
load_line: Current CPU {cpu}% · Memory {mem}% · Total memory {totalGb} GB

sections.storage_cleanup: Cleanup candidates that may be hidden as System Data
sections.storage_developer: Developer tools and simulators grouped under Developer
sections.monitor: ⏱️ 5-minute idle monitor (find the real CPU culprit)
sections.monitor_none: 5-minute monitor not yet run. The idle test catches the 'real culprit'.
sections.autoruns_desc: Windows: registry, scheduled tasks, services, drivers, browser extensions, WMI events, and ~20 other persistence points. macOS: launchd, login items, extensions.
sections.installs: 📦 Programs installed in the last 30 days

vt_summary.enabled: 🛰️ VirusTotal enabled · {calls} lookups this scan · {hours}h cache · hash only (no file upload)
vt_summary.disabled: ℹ️ VirusTotal disabled. To enable, set enabled: true and your API key in data/config.json. Get an API key

storage.decoder_note: macOS groups large chunks of disk usage under vague labels like System Data, Developer, and macOS. This section translates that bar into real paths and practical meanings.
storage.full_disk_note: macOS privacy settings may hide some personal-data or app-data areas. If the report looks empty, check System Settings > Privacy & Security > Full Disk Access.

danger.1: Do not delete suspicious items immediately; first verify the program name and path.
danger.2: Run a full scan with Windows Defender or your primary antivirus.
danger.3: If banking, work, or government sessions are open, close sensitive browser sessions before investigating.

warning.1: Compare each check item against recent installs, publisher names, and expected local software.
warning.2: Use the Google and VirusTotal report links to understand unknown items before acting.
warning.3: If you have not run the 5-minute idle monitor yet, run the full scan.

safe.1: This report does not show items that need immediate action.
safe.2: Keep antivirus definitions and OS security updates current.
safe.3: If the PC still feels slow or noisy, run the full scan to inspect idle CPU usage.

common.review_findings: Review {count} attention item(s) below, including path and explanation.
common.share_warning: Before sharing this report for help, redact personal details in PC name, user name, and file paths.

muted.autorunsc_disabled: Sysinternals autorunsc not installed or disabled. Set sysinternals.useAutorunsc to true in data/config.json.
